# Dia Browser Release Notes - Latest Versions

## v1.23.0 (March 19, 2026)
**"From review to merge to what's next"**

### GitHub Live Tab Groups Improvements
- Celebration animations signaling PR transitions from in-progress to completed
- Automatic cleanup visualization when PRs are merged
- Hover preview of recently finished pull requests with quick restoration capability

### Visual Polish
- Expressive animations added to browser navigation controls (back, forward, reload buttons)

## v1.22.0 (March 11, 2026)
**"Don't think about the next step. Take it."**

## v1.21.0 (March 5, 2026)
**"Before you reach for it..."**

## v1.20.0 (February 26, 2026)
**"Little moments. Big feeling."**

## Navigation Elements
- Download button/link available
- "View All Release Notes" option provided
- Footer with company links and social media references
